pkgmetadata.longdescription: python-romkanpython-romkan httpsgithub.comsoimortpython-romkan_ is a RomajiKana conversion library for Python, which is used to convert a Japanese Romaji () string to a Japanese Kana () string or vice versa.It is the Pythonic port of RubyRomkan http0xcc.netruby-romkanindex.html.en_, originally authored by Satoru Takabayashi and ported httplilyx.netpython-romkan_ by Masato Hagiwara.python-romkan httpsgithub.comsoimortpython-romkan_ works on Python 2 and Python 3 (fully tested on Python 2.6, 2.7, 3.2, 3.3 and PyPy). It handles both Katakana () and Hiragana () with the Hepburn () romanization system, as well as the modern Kunrei-shiki () romanization system.Project homepage httpwww.soimort.orgpython-romkanFork me on GitHub httpsgithub.comsoimortpython-romkan.. image httpsapi.travis-ci.orgsoimortpython-romkan.pngInstallation------------) Install via Pip httpwww.pip-installer.org_ pip install romkan ) Install via EasyInstall httppypi.python.orgpypisetuptools_ easy_install romkan ) Install from Git git clone gitgithub.comsoimortpython-romkan.git python setup.py installUsage-----Python 3.x python import romkan print(romkan.to_roma()) ninja print(romkan.to_hepburn()) ninja print(romkan.to_kunrei()) ninzya print(romkan.to_hiragana(ninja)) print(romkan.to_katakana(ninja)) Python 2.x python2 import romkan print romkan.to_roma(u) ninja print romkan.to_hepburn(u) ninja print romkan.to_kunrei(u) ninzya print romkan.to_hiragana(ninja) print romkan.to_katakana(ninja) API Reference------------- to_katakana(string)Convert a Romaji () to a Katakana (). to_hiragana(string)Convert a Romaji () to a Hiragana (). to_kana(string)Convert a Romaji () to a Katakana (). (same as to_katakana) to_hepburn(string)Convert a Kana () or a Kunrei-shiki Romaji () to a Hepburn Romaji (). to_kunrei(string)Convert a Kana () or a Hepburn Romaji () to a Kunrei-shiki Romaji (). to_roma(string)Convert a Kana () to a Hepburn Romaji ().License-------python-romkan httpsgithub.comsoimortpython-romkan_ is licensed under the BSD license httpsraw.github.comsoimortpython-romkanmasterLICENSE_.Changelog0.2.1-----Date 2013-02-26 Improved Python compatibility (2.6, 3.1).0.2.0-----Date 2013-02-21 Fixed the explicit unicode literal issue on Python 3.2. Tested on Travis CI for Python 2.7, 3.2, 3.3 and PyPy.0.1.0-----Date 2013-02-120.0.2-----Date 2013-01-29 Fixed 1.0.0.1-----Date 2012-12-06 Initial release.
